content: Mars has two small natural satellites, or moons. Their names are Phobos and Deimos, both named after the Greek mythological characters who accompanied Ares, the god of war (Mars in Roman mythology).
raw_content: Mars has two small natural satellites, or moons. Their names are Phobos and Deimos, both named after the Greek mythological characters who accompanied Ares, the god of war (Mars in Roman mythology).
